greeting.text: Ah, a steady pair of hands. I've a sealed dispatch that must reach Ranger Sella out in the Hunter's Clearing. Will you carry it?

responses.text: I'll take the dispatch to Ranger Sella.

reward.text: Coin and the Guild's goodwill — thirty gold and a fair measure of experience once Sella has it in hand.

accepted.text: Good. Keep it dry and keep it moving — Sella waits in the Hunter's Clearing, west through the Darkwood.

declined.text: Suit yourself. The dispatch will keep — for a while.
